Speaker Media Kit · 2026 · Strategic Transformations

Strategic Transformations | AI-Era Leadership · Human x AI Workforce Readiness

Nikki Cates

Structural Recalibration Strategist & Speaker

"AI accelerates what your structure already carries."

Nikki Cates helps organizations prepare for the Human x AI workforce alliance by diagnosing the structural strain AI acceleration exposes. Her speaking equips executives, managers, and mission-driven leaders to see burnout, hidden labor, decision friction, authority gaps, and cultural debt as design conditions that must be recalibrated.

Her work sits at the intersection of AI-era leadership, organizational diagnostics, responsibility-authority asymmetry, behavioral science, emotional intelligence, spiritual intelligence, and human sustainability. She brings a diagnostician's precision and a practitioner's credibility to every stage.

nikki@strategicunmasking.com

nikkicates.github.io

Army Veteran10+ Years Operational LeadershipUNMASK Framework CreatorHuman x AI Workforce ReadinessWomanist TheologianPublished Author
★★★★★ 5.0 · Google Reviews
What Audiences Say

"Her message was raw, real, and unforgettable. With every word, she peeled back the emotional layers we so often hide behind. Nikki reminded us that healing starts when we get honest about the parts we cover up."

Emmanuel Simms Healing Cosplay Theory

"She captivated the audience from the moment she stepped on stage and delivered powerful, practical insights. Her authenticity, energy, and ability to connect made a lasting impact on every woman in the room. I would absolutely recommend her for any speaking engagement."

Jeunyde Josuin Purple Butterflies Foundation
Signature Talks

AI-Era Leadership Talks for the Human x AI Workforce

These executive-facing keynotes and workshops help organizations diagnose and recalibrate the human and structural strain AI acceleration reveals. All talks are available as 30-90 min keynotes, workshop formats, or panel presentations.

Anchor Keynote

"AI Accelerates What Exists: Preparing Organizations for the Human x AI Workforce Alliance"

AI is not just changing work; it is exposing the structural conditions that were already shaping it. This talk helps leaders understand how AI accelerates existing patterns of burnout, hidden labor, decision friction, authority gaps, and cultural debt.

Audience leaves with: A clearer understanding of what AI reveals, where strain is being transferred, and what must be recalibrated before adoption becomes overload.
Manager Enablement

"The Frictionless Manager: Equipping Managers to Lead the Human x AI Workforce Alliance"

A practical session introducing the UNMASK framework as a leadership architecture model for reducing structural drag in the Human x AI workplace, with attention to communication, emotional intelligence, spiritual intelligence, AI pacing, and authority alignment.

Audience leaves with: Tools to uncover team friction, navigate behavioral differences, advocate upward, sustain implementation rhythms, and kindle human judgment and purpose amid change.
Executive Strategy

"Stop the Strain Transfer: Why Your Best Leaders Are Burning Out"

Reframes burnout as a structural design issue, not a personal resilience gap. Moves organizations from wellness management to source-level diagnosis and recalibration.

Audience leaves with: A language for identifying where unresolved organizational strain is being redistributed onto high-capacity people.
Organizational Diagnostics

"The Hidden Labor Map: What Your Org Chart Cannot See"

Surfaces the invisible labor, relational repair, translation work, and emotional load that keep organizations functioning while remaining unmeasured and under-authorized.

Audience leaves with: A diagnostic lens for naming hidden labor before AI implementation automates around the people holding the system together.
Leadership Architecture

"Responsibility Without Authority: The Leadership Gap AI Will Expose"

Examines how responsibility-authority asymmetry creates stalled decisions, masked leadership, and implementation drag, especially when AI tools increase the pace of work.

Audience leaves with: A practical way to identify authority gaps and realign decision rights before managers become the shock absorbers for change.
Strategic Reset

"UNMASK Leadership Architecture: Recalibrating the System Before the Next Initiative Lands"

A workshop or intensive for leaders who need to diagnose structural burnout, hidden labor, behavioral friction, and implementation strain before another transformation effort compounds the problem.

Audience leaves with: A shared architecture for prioritizing recalibration, reducing structural drag, and protecting human sustainability.
Watch Nikki in Action

Speaker Reel & Featured Talks

See the diagnostic precision, the room presence, and the clarity that moves leadership teams to action.

YouTube: youtube.com/@iamnikkicates

URI Formation · Faith, Justice & Community Audiences

Liberation & Leadership Formation

These offerings draw from the UNMASK framework, adapted for faith-based, justice-centered, and formation-focused communities. Nikki is a Liberation & Leadership Formation Strategist operating at the intersection of Womanist theology, structural analysis, and identity work.

Tier 1 · Keynote

"Unmasking, Identity & Self-Stewardship in Systems That Demand Performance"

Reframes burnout as structural and spiritual. Introduces the self-stewardship pathway for leaders in service-based and justice-centered roles.

Format: 60–90 min · In-person or virtual
Tier 2 · Intensive

"Liberation & Healing Intensive"

Deep formation experience integrating identity work, boundary restoration, and the Super Employee Mask. Includes SU frameworks, Seasons 1 & 2.

Format: Half-day / Full-day / Multi-day
Tier 3 · Series

"Liberation & Leadership Formation Series"

Sustained transformation across 3–6 sessions. Womanist theology integration, community processing, leadership application, and implementation.

Format: 3–6 sessions · Cohort format
Tier 4 · Advisory

"Liberation & Leadership Advisory Partnership"

Institutional transformation through 3–6 month embedded partnership. Monthly advisory sessions, curriculum guidance, and community health check-ins.

Format: 3–6 month engagement
"Limited engagements are reserved each year for smaller organizations and community-based initiatives. Please inquire for availability."
Submit URI Formation Inquiry →
Engagement Pricing

Pricing Available Upon Executive Briefing

Pricing available upon Executive Briefing. Every engagement is scoped around audience, organizational readiness, delivery format, and the transformation outcome required.

Request Executive Briefing →
Speaker Logistics / Travel Requirements

Professional, Planner-Friendly Logistics

Deposit 50% of speaking fee due upon contract signing to secure engagement date.
Balance Remaining balance due 7 days prior to engagement.
Air Travel Roundtrip airfare booked at Comfort Plus, Premium Economy, or equivalent for flights over 3 hours. Business Class requested for long-haul or international engagements.
Hotel 4-star hotel or equivalent accommodations. One night pre-event and one night post-event when required by travel schedule.
Ground Transportation Professional ground transportation, rideshare, or car service provided for airport, hotel, and venue transfers.
Meals & Incidentals Meals and incidental travel expenses reimbursed at actual cost or agreed per diem rate.
Virtual Engagements Virtual engagements scoped separately. No travel costs apply.
Cancellation Deposit non-refundable within 30 days of engagement. Full fee retained within 14 days.
Contract Signed agreement required for all engagements.

Nikki Cates
